titleStmt.title: Letter from Rev Robert J. Burts to John Francis Hogan, 18 May 1916
Letters 1916-1923
titleStmt.author: Robert J. Burts

editionStmt.p: This work was originally published by Maynooth University in Ireland in 2017. In 2026 this data, stored in a relational database was extracted and converted into this TEI/XML document.

availability.p: This is an open access work licensed under Creative Commons Attribution NonCommercial 4.0 International license (CC BY-NC 4.0).

note.p: This letter was addressed to Rev Dr John Francis Hogan (1858–1918), a priest, author, and president of St Patrick's College, Maynooth.The letter was sent by Rev Robert J. Burts of the Catholic Diocese of Cork (1871-1957). In this letter Robert Burts is informing John Hogan of the faculties for the Cork Students which have been signed by order of Rev Dr Thomas Alphonsus O'Callaghan (1886-1916), bishop of Cork. These faculties are to lie in the discretion of John Hogan.

projectDesc.p: The data in these XML files was generated based on a data dump from the Magellan database (https://github.com/Maynooth-Center-for-Digital-Humanities/Magellan). Each database record has been converted to a JSON file (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/json). The element section of the JSON file contains the TEI-encoded contents of the letters. The TEI XML has been cleaned and made well-formed using a Python script (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/src).

body.ab:
21/8/17a The Cathedral,
Cork. 18/5/16
My dear Monsignor Hogan I have pleasure in
sending you the —
faculties for the Cork
students signed by
the Vicar-General by
order of Dr. O Callaghan.
It will lie in your -
discretion- to use them
when the time comes I am
ys very faithfully
R.Burts.cc
Secretary:
